behaviorsAudited: TUI boot reads the local .tmp/agenc-tui-completion-pipeline/events.jsonl pipeline event file directly through runtime/src/tui/completion-pipeline.ts and reconstructs current gate and prior results.

edgeCasesAudited: Missing file and unreadable file render no pipeline status.
Snapshot plus later events merge deterministically.
Old completed pipeline does not suppress prompt input on boot.
